assets.title: Asset Catalog
assets.subtitle: Manage all assets within your office scope.
assets.emptyNoDataSub: Start by adding your first asset to the catalog.
assets.emptyFilterSub: Try changing the keyword or resetting filters.

detail.moduleNotAvailable: No data yet — module not available
detail.maintenanceEmpty: No maintenance history yet for this asset

form.subNew: Register a new physical asset to the catalog.
form.subEdit: Update data of an existing asset.
form.banner: A new asset is submitted as a request and awaits approval (maker-checker) before it goes live in the catalog.
form.submitError: Couldn't submit the data. Check your connection and try again — your input hasn't been lost.
form.kodeNote: The asset tag can't be changed after it's created.
form.dropTitle: Drag & drop photos/documents, or click to upload
form.dropSub: JPG, PNG, or PDF — max. 10 MB per file
form.attachmentsAfterApproval: Attachments can be uploaded after the asset is approved
form.deprNoCategory: Select a category to see its depreciation configuration.

import.title: Bulk Asset Import
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV/XLSX file, validate row by row, then create valid assets.
import.templateSub: Use the standard column format so data is parsed correctly.
import.dropTitle: Click to pick a file, or drag it here
import.columnsNote: Columns marked * are required. The first row must be a header matching the column names above.
import.resultSub: Valid rows were created and entered the approval queue (maker-checker). Failed rows can be fixed and re-uploaded.

processing.validateSub: Checking each row against master data.
processing.createSub: Registering valid rows to the approval queue.

label.title: Label & Barcode
label.subtitle: Preview and print asset labels (Code128 + QR).
label.maxColsHint: Max {n} columns for this label size (A4 sheet limit).
label.emptySub: Check assets in the left panel to preview labels.
label.maxSelected: You can select up to {n} assets at a time.

assignment.title: Asset Assignment
assignment.subtitle: Check assets out to staff, return them, and view history.

checkout.assetHint: Only assets with status "Available" can be lent.
checkout.notePlaceholder: e.g. Borrowed for branch event support…
checkout.errIncomplete: Complete asset, staff, and borrow date.

checkin.needsMaintNote: If checked, the asset status becomes "Maintenance" after return.
checkin.errIncomplete: Select an assignment and fill the return date.
checkin.emptySub: All assets have been returned. Check one out first.

peminjaman.title: Asset Loans
peminjaman.subtitle: Request to borrow an asset and track its status.
peminjaman.infoBanner: The loan will be sent to your Manager for approval. The asset moves to you only after approval.

action.borrowDisabled: Only available assets can be borrowed

form.title: Request a Loan
form.subtitle: Pick an available asset and state your purpose.
form.asetHint: Only assets with status "Available" can be borrowed.
form.tempoHint: May be left empty if unsure.
form.alasanPlaceholder: e.g. Presentation to a priority client…

modal.title: Request Loan
modal.subtitle: Send a loan request for this asset.

list.title: My Loan Requests
list.emptySub: Submit an asset loan using the form above.

form.assetHint: Assets with status "In use" must be checked in before they can be transferred.
form.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Reallocate equipment to the destination branch…
form.error: Complete asset, destination, and transfer date.
form.noManagePermission: You do not have permission to submit transfers.

interRegion.title: Inter-region transfer
interRegion.note: The destination is in a different region. This transfer needs approval from the Regional Head on both sides before the asset ships.

transfer.inSubtreeNote: Within-region transfer — Unit Head approval is enough.

inbox.acceptSuccess: Asset "{name}" received. Location & status updated to Available at your office.
inbox.rejectSuccess: Receipt of "{name}" rejected and returned to origin.
inbox.emptySub: No assets are currently being shipped to your office.

rejectModal.title: Reject Receipt
rejectModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. Item condition doesn't match BAST…

ship.title: Confirm Shipment
ship.subtitle: Record the asset's condition when shipped before the status changes to In Transit.
ship.success: Asset "{name}" shipped. Status updated to In Transit.

disposal.pageSub: Submit asset disposal (sale/auction/grant/destroy) with gain/loss calculation and tiered approval.

form.assetHint: Assets currently in use must be checked in before they can be disposed.
form.valueHint: Enter 0 for grant/destroy with no value.
form.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Severely damaged & uneconomical to repair…
form.dropText: Upload report, condition photos, supporting docs
form.evidenceHint: Attachments are visible to the approver in Asset Detail.
form.error: Complete asset, date, and disposal method.
form.noManagePermission: You do not have permission to submit a disposal.

gainLoss.title: Disposal Gain / Loss
gainLoss.empty: Select an asset and enter a sale value to see the automatic gain/loss calculation.
gainLoss.bookValueHidden: Book value hidden for your role.

chain.title: Required Approval Chain
chain.sensitiveNote: Sensitive action — asset disposal alters the fixed-asset records and requires tiered approval based on book value.
chain.acquisitionHidden: Acquisition value hidden for your role.

submitted.title: Disposal request submitted
submitted.sub: Awaiting tiered approval per authorization limit.

attachBast.title: Attach Disposal Report
attachBast.hint: Upload the asset disposal handover report document.
attachBast.success: The disposal report for "{name}" was saved.

stockOpname.pageSub: Run physical inventory per office and reconcile asset variances.

create.title: New Stock-Take Session
create.sub: An asset snapshot is taken when the session starts.
create.name: Session Name
create.snapshotNote: On creation, the system snapshots all assets in the selected scope as the stock-take baseline.
create.error: Complete the session name, scope, and period.

scan.title: Scan Barcode / QR
scan.sub: Point the camera at an asset label — or tap to simulate
scan.notFoundMessage: Code "{code}" was not found within this session's scope.

followup.title: Request Transfer — Misplaced Asset
followup.sub: Asset "{name}" was found at a location different from its record. Submit a transfer to the actual location.
followup.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Asset was found at a different location during stock-take…

finish.title: Finish Stock-Take
finish.sub: Review the summary then generate the report.

empty.title: No stock-take sessions
empty.sub: Create the first physical inventory session for your office.

stockOpname.noManagePermission: You do not have permission to manage stock-take.

error.alreadyClosed: This session is already closed and cannot be changed.

depreciation.title: Depreciation
depreciation.subtitle: Run & close depreciation for each period on commercial and fiscal bases.
depreciation.noManageNote: You do not have permission to manage depreciation.

period.computedNote: Computed — review then close the period.
period.reminderBody: Run the depreciation computation for this period before continuing to the journal or reports.

schedule.impairDisabledFiscalTooltip: Fiscal does not recognize impairment — IAS 36 impairment applies to the commercial basis only

journal.subtitle: Depreciation journal summary for the current period per GL account.
journal.title: Depreciation Journal

impairment.title: Record Impairment
impairment.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Permanent damage from flooding; market value dropped significantly…

assetDetail.title: Depreciation History
assetDetail.masked: Depreciation values are masked for your role.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Manage schedules, maintenance notes, and damage reports.

jadwal.emptySub: Add a preventive maintenance schedule for an asset.

report.photoDrop: Click to upload a damage photo
report.queueNote: The report enters the queue as a maintenance request for the Manager to review.
report.submitted: Damage report submitted & queued for maintenance.
report.emptySub: Damage reports you submit will appear here.

note.title: Add Maintenance Note
note.subtitle: Record a maintenance action for an asset.
note.readOnlyHint: Completed or cancelled notes can no longer be changed.

schedule.createSubtitle: Create a preventive maintenance schedule for an asset.

approval.title: Requests & Approval
approval.notEligible: This request is awaiting another approver or is outside your authority.
approval.sensitiveWarn: Sensitive action — please review the data carefully before deciding.
approval.notePlaceholder: Add a note for the requester…
approval.phSub: Pick a request from the left panel to review its details.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Build and export asset, depreciation, utilization, and cost reports.
reports.phSub: Set the report type and filters above, then click "Apply" to show the result.
reports.emptySub: No data matches the selected filters. Try changing the category or status.
reports.truncated: Showing the first {n} rows — data truncated.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage login accounts and their links to roles, offices, and employees.
users.emptyFilter: No accounts match the search or filter.
users.createSub: Create a new login account and link it to a role & office.
users.passwordNote: Leave empty if the user only logs in with Google.
users.pegawaiNote: Link to employee data to sync title & department.
users.deleteConfirm: Account “{nama}” ({email}) will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

rbac.title: Roles & RBAC
rbac.rolesSub: Pick a role to manage its permissions
rbac.lockNote: Built-in role: its name & code are locked, but permissions remain configurable.

add.title: Add Role
add.subtitle: Create a new custom role.
add.copyNote: Copy permissions from another role as a starting point.

dataScope.title: Data Scope
dataScope.subtitle: Set the data scope level per role. The Default column applies to all modules; module columns can override the default when needed.
dataScope.footNote: Example: the Manager role uses the office default but is overridden to office_subtree for Assets and own for Requests — showing different scope per module within one role.

fieldPermission.title: Field Permission
fieldPermission.subtitle: Set which fields each role may view and edit, per entity. Fields without explicit rules follow the system default.
fieldPermission.footNote: Fields without an explicit rule follow the default (view & edit allowed). Configure per role to hide or lock sensitive fields.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Browse all system activity (read-only).
audit.emptySub: No activity matches the filter or date range.
audit.loadError: Failed to load the audit trail.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.excludedNote: {n} assets excluded from total value (valuation exclusion)

auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back. Please sign in to continue.
auth.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
auth.connectionError: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.brandHeadline: Asset management, neat and in control.
auth.brandTagline: Catalog, lending, maintenance and reporting across a 4-tier office structure — all in one system.
auth.brandFeature1: Centralized asset catalog across office tiers

error.not_registered: No account exists for this Google email. Contact your admin.
error.account_mismatch: This email is already linked to a different Google account.
error.server: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your account email. If it's registered, we'll send a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If the email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.forgotRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
auth.resetInvalid: The link is invalid or has expired.
auth.resetSuccess: Password changed successfully. Please sign in again.
auth.verifyEmailError: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

item.approvalPending: A new lending request is awaiting approval
item.maintenanceDue: Toyota Avanza maintenance is due tomorrow

offices.title: Office Master Data
offices.subtitle: Manage the 4-tier office hierarchy
offices.pilihKantor: Select an office to view details
offices.pilihKantorSub: Click an office in the hierarchy to view its details.
offices.aktifHint: Active offices can be selected when assigning assets
offices.emptyFloorsSub: Add a floor to start organizing rooms in this office.
offices.noRoomMsg: No rooms on this floor yet.
offices.addSub: Register a new office in the hierarchy.
offices.deleteBody: Office “{nama}” and all its child offices will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
offices.deleteFloorConfirm: Delete floor “{nama}”? All rooms on this floor will also be removed.
offices.deleteRoomConfirm: Delete room “{nama}”? This action cannot be undone.
offices.required: Name, Code, and Office Type are required.
offices.coordHint: Optional — used to show the office on the Location Map.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Manage employee data within your office scope.
employees.emptyFilter: No employees match the selected filters.
employees.createSub: Register a new employee to an office.
employees.scopeNote: Office choices are limited to your role scope.
employees.deleteConfirm: Employee “{nama}” (NIP {nip}) will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
employees.required: NIP, Name, and Office are required.

categories.title: Asset Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage fixed-asset classes with commercial (IAS 16), fiscal (PMK 72/2023) depreciation, and GL accounts.
categories.emptyFilter: No asset category matches the search or filter.
categories.deleteConfirm: “{name}” will be removed from the category master. Ensure no asset still uses this category.

hint.parent: Leave empty for a top category; pick a parent for a sub-category.
hint.capitalization: Minimum value to capitalize as a fixed asset.
hint.buildingLock: Building assets must use Straight Line.

reference.deleteConfirm: Entry “{name}” will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

import.title: Bulk Import — {target}
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV/XLSX file, validate row by row, then create the valid data.
import.invalidTargetSub: Use the Import link on the Employees, Offices, or Reference page.
import.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to import this data.

map.title: Office Location Map
map.usageNote: Provinces & Cities are managed in Reference; office coordinates are set on the office form (Office Master Data).
map.emptyMapSub: Adjust the filter to see office pins.

account.title: Profile & Account Settings
account.emailLockNote: Email is managed by your Google account and cannot be changed.
account.secAccountHint: The following data is managed by an administrator and cannot be changed here.
account.phoneManagedNote: Phone number is managed on the employee record.
account.emailVerifySent: A verification link has been sent to {email}. Click the link to confirm.
account.changePasswordDesc: We'll email you a password-reset link once your current password is verified.
account.pwChangeSent: A password-reset link has been sent to your email.
account.googleTitle: This account signs in via Google
account.googleNote: Password is not managed in Inventra. Manage your password & security in your Google account.
account.lThemeHint: Choose light, dark, or follow your system.
account.notifApprovalDesc: When your request is approved or rejected
account.notifMaintDesc: When an asset is due for maintenance
account.notifAssignDesc: When an asset is checked out to you
account.toastProfileMsg: Your personal data changes have been saved.
account.toastLogoutMsg: You have been logged out of all other devices.
account.errWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters

search.emptySub: Try another keyword or check the spelling.
search.scopeNote: Results limited to your scope & permissions

wizard.wrongType: Unsupported format. Use a CSV or XLSX file.
wizard.columnsNoteGeneric: Download the template to see the expected columns for this target.
wizard.rowsError: Failed to load rows. Please try again.

result.title: Import processed
result.desc: Valid data was created. Failed rows can be fixed and re-uploaded.

approval.title: Submitted for approval
approval.desc: This asset batch was submitted and is awaiting maker-checker approval before the assets are created.

rejected.title: Request rejected
rejected.desc: The import request was rejected by the approver. Download the rows to review and resubmit.

cellErrors.multiOffice: Batch spans more than one office

jobErrors.badHeader: Column header does not match the template.
jobErrors.tooManyRows: Row count exceeds the maximum limit.
jobErrors.scopeResolveFailed: Failed to resolve the office scope.
jobErrors.submitFailed: Failed to submit the batch to the approval queue.
jobErrors.executeFailed: Failed to create data from the batch.
jobErrors.noOffice: The target office could not be determined.
jobErrors.unknown: Something went wrong while processing the file.
